title: mentha hieronymi
intro: Mentha hieronymi, also known as Hieronymus peppermint or Hieronymus mint, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region and is characterized by its purple flowers and distinctive minty aroma. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat digestive issues and relieve pain. Mentha hieronymi can be prepared as a tea, oil, or tincture, and is often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fevers, and sore throats, and also to promote digestion and respiratory health.
